Ronald Reagan Foundation and Institute ukax Estados Unidos markanx janiw mä amtax utjkiti, jupax Reagan Jilïr Irpirix sartasiwayi, jupax aka markanx walikiw sasaw arsuwayi. Reagan Irpirix taripäwinakat jaytawayi, yaqhip markanx taripäwinakat jaytawayi, ukatx yaqhip markanx taripäwinakat jaytawayarakiwa.
